appDescription.message: FitShield browser extension that helps you stay mindful of food delivery and fast-food ordering.

timerDurationHint.message: Adjust the countdown before Lean ar aghaidh appears.

siteOpenTimeHint.message: Choose how long suíomhanna stay open after the timer ends.

scheduleDefaultSummary.message: Blocáil will follow your daily sceideal when this is enabled.

popupBlockerSubtitle.message: Turn every blocáil list on or off.

popupMetadataSubtitle.message: Blocáil whole groups of suíomhanna by tír or food catagóir.

popupCustomSubtitle.message: Cuir leis your own suíomhanna and disable them individually.

popupScheduleSubtitle.message: Úsáidful for meal budgets, late-night ordering, or work hours.

statusAllDisabled.message: Blocálaí is on, but every individual suíomh is disabled. Oscail Socruithe to turn some suíomhanna back on.

statusBypassActive.message: Temporary pass is active. Blocáil resumes in $1.

statusOutsideSchedule.message: Blocálaí is armed, but outside sceideald hours. It will blocáil from $1.

warningIntro.message: Check in before you order. Hunger, convenience, stress, and habit can feel similar in the moment.

warningHintLocked.message: When the timer ends, you can continue to the suíomh for $1 $2.

warningUnlockHint.message: You can visit the suíomh now. The blocálaí will come back automatically after $1 $2.

warningErrorHint.message: Something went wrong while opening the suíomh. Please try again.

scheduledHoursHint.message: Blocáil only during a daily time window.

customizeBlocklistIntro.message: Choose which built-in groups are active, turn individual suíomhanna on or off, and add your own domains.

customUrlsSettingsSubtitle.message: Cuir leis your own domains and disable them individually.

addCustomUrlLabel.message: Cuir leis a custom blocáiled URL

customNormalizeHint.message: Entries are normalized to domains and blocáiled across all pages.

customEmptyDefault.message: Níl aon suíomh saincheaptha bactha fós. Cuir fearann mar example.com leis thuas chun tús a chur lena bhacadh.

customNoMatch.message: No URLanna saincheaptha match this search.

emptyDeliverySearch.message: No suíomhanna seachadta match this search.

emptyFastFoodSearch.message: No suíomhanna mearbhia match this search.

invalidUrlNotice.message: That URL does not look valid yet. Try a domain like example.com.

alreadyOnBlocklist.message: $1 is already on the blocáillist, so it has been re-enabled.

addedToBlocklist.message: $1 was added to the custom blocáillist.

removedFromBlocklist.message: $1 was removed from the custom blocáillist.

metadataIntro.message: Blocáil whole groups of suíomhanna by the tír a brand operates in or the kind of food it serves. These blocáils add to your existing suíomh and custom-URL blocáils.

blockByCountryHint.message: Cuardaigh by tír name or code, e.g. "United" or "US". Enabling a tír blocáils every brand active there.

countryQuickEmpty.message: Cumasaigh a tír from search to pin it here.

blockByCategoryHint.message: Cuardaigh catagóirí like burger, pizza, or coffee. Specialties are searchable too; the blocáil applies by catagóir.

categoryQuickEmpty.message: Cumasaigh a catagóir from search to pin it here.

languageIntro.message: Choose the language FitShield uses for its own screens. This overrides your browser language for the extension only.

languageHint.message: Cuardaigh for a language and select it. Choose Córas default to follow your browser.

noLanguagesMatch.message: Ní mheaitseálann aon teanga an cuardach sin.

systemThemeHint.message: Device preference or a fixed mode.

supportFooterText.message: If FitShield helped you avoid an unnecessary delivery order, optional support helps keep blocáillists and docs moving.

backupIntro.message: Save your FitShield settings to a file, or restore them on another device. Everything stays on your device — nothing is uploaded.

importErrorNotice.message: That file isn't a valid FitShield backup.

blockReasonHeading.message: Cén fáth a bhfeiceann tú é seo

protectionStatusIntro.message: Meastachán príobháideach ar an ngléas ar a bhfuil FitShield tar éis cabhrú leat a scipeáil. Meastacháin iad seo agus ní uaslódáiltear aon rud.

avgMealCostHint.message: Úsáidtear é chun an t-airgead a sábháiltear a mheas nuair a scipeálann tú ordú. Stóráilte ar do ghléas amháin.

resetIntro.message: Athshocraíonn sé codanna de FitShield go dtí na réamhshocruithe. Iarrann gach gníomh deimhniú ar dtús.

resetBlockingHint.message: Amadóirí, sceideal, lasca suíomh, URLanna saincheaptha, agus bacanna tír/catagóir.

resetPreferencesHint.message: Meánchostas béile, socruithe calraí, agus do staitisticí sábháilte.

factoryResetHint.message: Scrios gach rud agus cuir FitShield ar ais go suiteáil úr.

confirmResetBlocking.message: Athshocraigh gach socrú bactha go dtí na réamhshocruithe? Coinnítear do théama, teanga agus staitisticí.

confirmResetAppearance.message: Athshocraigh an téama agus an chuma go dtí an mód dorcha réamhshocraithe?

confirmResetPreferences.message: Athshocraigh do roghanna costais agus calraí, móide na staitisticí airgid shábháilte agus calraí a seachnaíodh?

confirmFactoryReset.message: Athshocrú monarchan FitShield? Scriosann sé seo gach socrú, suíomh saincheaptha agus staitistic ar an ngléas seo. Ní féidir é a chealú.

confirmRemoveCustomSite.message: Bain $1 de do liosta bactha saincheaptha?

recipeChooseButton.message: Déanfaidh mé é seo ina ionad

recipeChoiceNote.message: Rogha mhaith — logáilte i do staitisticí. Féach é sna Socruithe.

avgMealCaloriesHint.message: Úsáidtear é chun na calraí a seachnaíodh a mheas nuair a roghnaíonn tú oideas ina ionad. Stóráilte ar do ghléas amháin.

reorderCardLabel.message: Atheagraigh cárta: $1. Úsáid na heochracha saighde chun é a bhogadh.

welcomeSubtitle.message: Cúpla rogha tapa agus tá tú réidh. Fanann gach rud ar do ghléas — ní uaslódáiltear aon rud.

welcomeLangBody.message: Socraíonn sé seo an teanga do phreabfhuinneog, socruithe agus scáileán bactha FitShield.

welcomeThemeBody.message: Is féidir leat na dathanna a mhionchoigeartú níos déanaí sna Socruithe.

welcomeFastFoodBody.message: Cuireann sé scáileán sosa le leathanaigh ordaithe slabhraí móra mearbhia.

welcomeDeliveryBody.message: Cuireann sé scáileán sosa le hardáin seachadta ar nós DoorDash agus Uber Eats.

welcomeImportBody.message: Ag teacht ó ghléas eile? Iompórtáil comhad socruithe FitShield chun gach rud a thabhairt leat. Seachas sin, lean ar aghaidh.

welcomeFeaturePauseBody.message: Nuair a bhuaileann tú suíomh bactha, ritheann comhaireamh síos gairid sula leanann tú ar aghaidh — go leor chun athmhachnamh a dhéanamh ar an ordú.

welcomeFeatureScheduleBody.message: Go roghnach, bac ach amháin ag uaireanta socraithe, mar shampla tráthnóna nó am oibre.

welcomeFeatureWhitelistBody.message: Múch aon suíomh, cuir do URLanna féin leis, nó tabhair pas sealadach duit féin nuair a bhíonn sé ag teastáil go géar.

welcomeFeatureRecipeBody.message: Molann an scáileán bactha oideas glasraí tapa agus oideas feola/próitéine bunaithe ar an méid a bhac tú.

statsMostBlockedSites.message: Suímh is mó a cuireadh bac orthu

statsMostBlockedCategories.message: Catagóirí is mó a cuireadh bac orthu

statsMostBlockedCountries.message: Tíortha is mó a cuireadh bac orthu

statsMostBlockedEmpty.message: Níor taifeadadh aon bhac go fóill.
